content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: authz_bypass ∧ drop_hdr ⇒ data_tamper
P: hdr_override → spoof(x-user-id)
V: keep_401 ∧ sess_only
R: ! spoof_denied ∧ ! authz_bypass
A: data_tamper

[AUDIT]
Goal: review(patch).
Hypothesis: authorization bypass and drop the header path implies data_tamper.
Plan: header override then spoof(x-user-id).
Verify: keep 401 behavior and verified session auth only.
Risk: high-risk spoofed requests denied and high-risk authorization bypass.
Answer target: data_tamper.
